subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.10
question_html:
What is the IUPAC name of NiCO3?

A. nickel(II) carbonate

B. nickel carbonate

C. nickel(I) carbonate

D. nitrogen(I) carbonate
examiners_html: More than 81 % of candidates could correctly apply IUPAC nomenclature for an inorganic substance.
